candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label at the top of the income statement; matches total sales/revenue concept.
Also a valid revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes across years.
Operating profit, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Incl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income metric, not revenue.

Liability, not reported top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; both are valid top-line rows and later code can take the first available by year.

candidates.why: Direct production input cost on the income statement; best available COGS-type row.
Inventory asset on the balance sheet, not an expense.

variables.notes: No explicit 'Cost of sales' line is shown; 'Raw Materials' is the best direct cost row.

candidates.why: Overhead bucket and valid SG&A component, though the label appears twice in the preview which creates ambiguity.
Explicit SG&A label, but appears unpopulated in preview while a closely related populated variant exists.
Explicit SG&A row and populated in recent years; strongest SG&A anchor.
Administrative overhead concept, but unpopulated in preview.
Core operating overhead component and populated across years.
Potential SG&A component but unpopulated.
Potential SG&A component but unpopulated.
R&D row is supplemental and below operating profit; not appropriate to include in SG&A here.
Capitalized R&D supplemental item, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: R:nc. Selected the explicit SG&A row plus broad overhead buckets to cover years where SG&A is not populated. Manual review is needed because 'Other Operating Expenses' appears twice in column A, and the exact intended occurrence cannot be uniquely identified from the preview alone.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

Best dedicated R&D expense label available, though shown in supplemental section below operating profit.
Capitalized amount, not expense to use as XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not direct R&D expense.

variables.notes: Only dedicated R&D-type line is the supplemental row below operating profit, so it is used for XRD only and not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line that includes non-interest items; less preferred than granular interest lines.

Not interest expense.
Not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring interest component that should be included with interest expense if not already embedded.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Using granular recurring interest cost rows and excluding broader 'Financial Expense' because it includes derivatives/other finance items.

candidates.why: Single equity component, not total book equity.
Best available total equity line; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown.
Combined equity including minority interest if any; less preferred due to possible double counting with MIB.
Balancing/subtotal helper row, not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is available, so 'Total Equity' is used and MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Correct concept, but appears unpopulated and no separate non-controlling interest amount is evident; using it with Total Equity could risk double counting.
Combined total, not minority interest alone.

variables.notes: No standalone non-controlling interest amount is evident. Since BE uses 'Total Equity', MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
